  "page_type": "other",
  "summary": "This is a promotional cover page for a Haier Oil-Free Centrifugal Chiller. It features the product name in both Chinese and English, the Haier brand logo, an image of the chiller unit, and a background image of a modern building interior. It includes company contact information and a QR code.",

  "ocr_text_if_useful": "Haier\n海尔磁悬浮变频离心机\nHAIER OIL-FREE CENTRIFUGAL CHILLER\nHaier\n青岛海尔空调电子有限公司\n地址：青岛经济技术开发区海尔开发区工业园\n电话：4006 999 999\n网址：www.haier.com\nSYYB-HRCXFZYKT15BA001302\n设计总览：林毅、书鹏。版权所有保留所有权利。未经许可，不得以任何方式复制、转载或摘录本书任何内容，否则将追究法律责任。\n青岛海尔空调电子有限公司\n服务热线：4006999999\n服务体验网址：http://service.haier.com\n你的生活智慧\n我的智慧生活\n制冷百家网：www.zhilengbai.cn",
